query:
SELECT b.id, b.status, b.sessionDate, b.sessionStartTime, b.totalAmountCents, p.name, p.type
FROM bookings b
LEFT JOIN programs p ON b.programId = p.id
ORDER BY b.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
